let w0: T satisfy { identity_fn(w0) != identity_semiring_hom[T].hom(w0) }

function[T0: Semiring, T1: Semiring](x0: SemiringHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[SemiringHom[T0, T1]](x0) != SemiringHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[T, T](identity_semiring_hom[T], identity_fn[T], w0)

compose[S, T, T](identity_semiring_hom[T].hom, f.hom) = lhs.hom
compose[S, T, T](identity_semiring_hom[T].hom, f.hom) != lhs.hom

function(x0: S) { compose[S, T, T](identity_fn[T], f.hom, x0) = lhs.hom(x0) }(w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T1](identity_fn[T1], x0, x1) = x0(x1) }[S, T](f.hom, w0)
function[T0: Semiring, T1: Semiring](x0: SemiringHom[T0, T1], x1: SemiringHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom != x1.hom or x0 = x1 }[S, T](compose_semiring_hom[S, T, T](identity_semiring_hom[T], f), f)

compose_semiring_hom[S, T, T](identity_semiring_hom[T], f).hom != f.hom
compose_semiring_hom[S, T, T](identity_semiring_hom[T], f).hom = f.hom
let w0: S satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != compose[S, S, T](f.hom, identity_semiring_hom[S].hom, w0) }

function[T0: Semiring, T1: Semiring, T2: Semiring](x0: SemiringHom[T1, T2], x1: SemiringHom[T0, T1], x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0.hom, x1.hom, x2) = compose_semiring_hom[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1).hom(x2) }[S, S, T](f, identity_semiring_hom[S], w0)

compose[S, S, T](f.hom, identity_semiring_hom[S].hom) = lhs.hom
compose[S, S, T](f.hom, identity_semiring_hom[S].hom) != lhs.hom
let w0: S satisfy { lhs.hom(w0) != f.hom(w0) }
function(x0: S) { compose[S, S, T](f.hom, identity_fn[S], x0) = lhs.hom(x0) }(w0)

compose_semiring_hom[S, S, T](f, identity_semiring_hom[S]).hom != f.hom
compose_semiring_hom[S, S, T](f, identity_semiring_hom[S]).hom = f.hom
